Dh. -
After 44-45, he will earn lakhs of
rupees. This exalted state of success
and harmony will run upto the 60th year. His whole life after 45 will be of
growing prosperity. He will beget one son and one daughter. He will finally
shuffle off his mortal coil at 68.
